title: Zlato's Place
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Zlato's Place''' was a restaurant and lounge on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] run by the [[Sljee (species)|Sljee]] [[Jeseej]]. It was [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]]-themed, with the staff, food, and decorations all Toydarian. Its signature dish was [[terratta]].

The restaurant was always half empty. However, this was not a problem for Jeseej, as the true purpose of Zlato's Place was a front for his side businesses, forgery and soothsaying. Access to these special services was only gained by giving a passcode to the restaurant's maitre d' and ordering a particular menu item based on another password.

Two [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] were employed to aid in forging.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
